task_completion.description: Update manifest.json to use a service worker instead of background scripts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of manifest.json showing the 'background' field updated to use 'service_worker' (e.g., "background": { "service_worker": "background.js" }) instead of the Manifest V2 'scripts' array.

task_completion.description: Update manifest.json to move the API endpoint to host_permissions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of manifest.json showing 'http://localhost:3000/*' inside a 'host_permissions' array, and removed from the standard 'permissions' array.

task_completion.description: Replace XMLHttpRequest with fetch() for network requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the extension's JavaScript code showing the use of the fetch() API to make network requests, with no remaining instances of 'new XMLHttpRequest()'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the asynchronous message listener returns true.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the JavaScript code showing 'chrome.runtime.onMessage.addListener' with a 'return true;' statement at the end of the callback function to keep the message channel open.

Screenshot of the JavaScript code showing 'chrome.storage.local.set' and 'chrome.storage.local.get' being used to manage the 'isTrackingActive' variable, replacing any global variable state management.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a text editor or IDE to modify the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the code being edited in a recognizable text editor (like VS Code, vim, or nano) rather than just echoing strings directly into files from the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the browser to check the extension.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Chrome browser open to 'chrome://extensions' with the 'Price Tracker & Deal Finder' extension visible, indicating the agent tested if it loads correctly.

integrity.description: Verify the code modifications are genuine and not just pasted instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code changes should integrate naturally into the existing JavaScript and JSON structures without containing markdown formatting or raw text from the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required API endpoint that must be moved to the 'host_permissions' array in manifest.json is exactly 'http://localhost:3000/*'.
